intent.objective: Advance Production Integration after RC3 COMPLETE: prepare next approved release gate while keeping beta.zenovell.com as Production Candidate and zenovell.com unreleased.
intent.strategy: Do not change application source. Verify GTM publish prerequisites (Ecommerce, pause, warnings) before any GTM publish authorization. Then proceed to Search Console / Ads readiness / full smoke only under explicit Owner gates.
intent.risk_acknowledgement: Low for application path (RC1–RC3 verified). Residual risk is GTM publish configuration debt and unreleased production domain.

stop_conditions: GTM publish without explicit Owner authorization
application source change without proven defect
production switch to zenovell.com without Production Gate
system.rollback_plan: Documentation/state-only rollback via git revert of RC3 closure commit. Application runtime remains d16191f-based RC1+RC2 code.

termination_conditions: attempt to publish GTM without verification and authorization
modification of application source or GTM/GA4 config without authority

next_safe_action: Prepare and execute the next approved Production Integration release gate without changing application source; verify GTM publish prerequisites before any publish authorization.
blockers: GTM publish prerequisites (Ecommerce/pause/warning) open until Owner UI re-confirm
Published public GTM conversion path not verified after publish
